reviews.review_description:
Amazing example of Mixed Reality…..

Great graphics and game play….

Highly Recommend…..

Would definitely purchase add-on content for more invading worlds and creatures…..

More voice/sound effects from the creatures would be great!

Highly Recommend…..
I was lost after little citis. But after finding this game i am having so much fun!
I start up, see the little critters banner, it asks me if i need to rescan the room, I hit looks good, then nothing. Just music while i stand there wondering whats supposed to be happening.

developer_response.body: Sorry you had some difficulty, we want to help. I've replied to your message on email and Instagram with more info.

reviews.review_description: As soon as I opened the game and started shooting those little monsters, I didn't expect this game to be that amazing! It's really fun that you can turn your room into a chaotic warzone. A must-play game! Thanks Purple Yonder!
Super fun for the whole family

If someone asks me, I would very much recommend this game. It's a really fun time and very well made strategy Mixed Reality game. If you feel like walking around your room and exterminate some bugs, this is the one for you. It has a lot of charm, and a nice sense of direction while accomplishing exactly what I wanted when I first started it. I'm looking forward to seeing what they add to it in the future.
I just purchased it because I loved space encounters. This one is top notch. Definitely worth purchasing especially when it's on sale!!!

I absolutely love this game. It’s currently the go-to game when we get the headset out. Casting to the tv means the family all gets involved. Watching my sister flap her arms around her head as she’s being swarmed by flying critters never gets old.

The mixed reality works really well, unlike some games.  The graphics really do make the critters appear to be in the room.  Can’t wait so see what happens with future updates.

I get the impression these developers are masters of their craft. The experience is fluid, animations are top tier and it just feels....clean and professional. Loving the Xmas update and I look forward to whatever you have cooking 🙏.

oh PS. I'm 38. This can be fun for all ages.

reviews.review_title: Best mr+hand tracking game I've played
reviews.review_description: I've played tons of games in the past 6 years of VR. I will say this one is my favorite blend of hand tracking and mr game I've ever played. it's very fun to play, and I was genuinely taken aback when I took off my vr headset and realized that the monsters weren't actually there. I was very immersed (something I don't get much these days)

Little Critters is a brilliant Mixed Reality experience packed with charm, action, and replayability. There are tons of levels to explore, enemies to outsmart (those tiny yellow critters are both hilarious and maddening!), and upgrades to unlock.

The design is polished, the controls are intuitive, and the way your real-world environment transforms into a critter-filled battlefield is pure magic. A clever mix of shooter and tower defense mechanics keeps things fresh for hours. Even if MR isn’t usually your thing — give this one a try. It’s a delight! 🐭💥

I've been looking for a satisfying tower defense game for a while now! This game puts an interesting spin on the genre and turns your living room into a td battle ground. Fun mechanics, sharp visuals, cute characters, funny animations and sounds, and great music!

Love the game it's fun and exciting everything connected just fine can't wait to see more traps more different creatures and more stuff added to the environment if you can make it look more exotic-like trees or wherevers is on their kind of planet they coming from in different type of weapons or slingshots and more crazy traps like lightning traps when they get electrocuted or if you act like a green balloon that if they touch it explodes and sticky slime covers them up and slows them down it's fine and exciting more stages more maps More weapons keep up the good work I love it and a lot of fun The colors the graphics is amazing
This game is really fun no problems about it but would be a lot better if it had like even more gadgets for your body and there was a mode that you could have the critters as pets.
Really is a great mixed reality game. If they added multi room user as well in the future it would be even better

Why don't they make more games like this - easy to get into, super fun to play, vey ingenious in design, not buggy, mixed reality and has hand tracking that actually works. A game perfect for VR! My vote for GOTY!!
The game is great. Loads of creative traps to choose from. I love how the critters climb around my furniture and interact with my play space. The sling shot weapon is really fun to use!

This game is rock solid. Great mechanics, visuals and gameplay. 
It’s got a great mix of tactical planning and frantic, physical action! The game is quite humorous at times with a zaniness to it reminiscent of the Gremlins movies.
Music and sound is also on point!
I thought a lot about buying this game, but I made the right decision to buy it, it's simply brilliant! I hope the game gets more features and will support the Hungarian subtitle too!

reviews.review_title: Mix Reality that makes you move
reviews.review_description: Yes, this is a kid friendly game. Looks like it was specifically made for kids. However, I was looking for a MR game that would keep me moving and I found it. It's not linear like a lot MR games. Tower defense Mobile game but in mix reality. You have a lot of options each wave too. I suggest hand tracking if you want to smash the critters in your hands.Thanks for creating a MR game that keeps you moving and y'all nailed it.

This game has been so much fun the mixed reality game play for tower defense is done so we'll and it's a great game to record a video of you playing to show friends and family that yes they do need a meta quest
If you like tower defense games this is it don’t think about it just get it!
This game would be perfect if we could upgrade our towers. But what’s offered is dang fun and easily one of my top tower defense games. One of the best uses of MR I’ve seen yet
This tower defence game is so fun since it uses your own room but about the game that it needs better hand control it is still good but whenever I fling a critter they freeze in the air and then fall

Had fun recording this game! Definitely one of the best mixed reality wave shooter games that genuinely gets me excited to play. There's tons of traps and critters. For a mixed-reality game, this has good amount of content.
simple concept and easy fun for any age. No extensive training necessary so its brainless fun. Well done

That's not only the best tower defense on VR, but one of the best tower defense games i tried on different platforms. This game deserves to sell millions of copies, easily one of the top games i would recommend for anyone 😃
Exactly what I've been looking for! The perfect game for handing your Quest to someone and knowing they're going to have a great time. Looks incredibly sharp, too.

Legit don’t understand why we took so long as a species to realise WE NEEDED THIS, but I am super stoked Purple Yonder solved this for us all.

Up with Laser Dance, this is a must have for Quest 3/3s headsets.
Super fun! Actually got a workout trying to replace the traps during a invasion 😂. Great job devs❤️

reviews.review_title: One of the best MR games
reviews.review_description: Cute. Well design. a lot of show case about how to use mixed reality features.
i had to buy this for a friend so he could enjoy also 😁
Really fun game, all my kids are loving it. The robots and critters are funny. Very enjoyable
5/5 stars, if I could give it 6 stars I would!! Family friendly fun! Easy enough to get into quickly, challenging enough to keep it interesting. Great game!

Such a great game this , If your a fan of Tower Defense games then this is for you 

Mixed Reality 
Interactive 
Fun
Its good
Super fun game that works really well!
anyone can pick this up and play it's so much fun
Approved! It is really fun
Hi
do you enjoy tower defense games? give this one a try. this one integrates augmented reality with cute characters at a very reasonable price.
definitely a great game to get acquainted with mixed reality perfect for 8 years old and up
